title: Lead SEO Specialist at ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a SEO Specialist in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd:
ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd!
